name: rabbitmq
explanation: RabbitMQ supports two collection modes: the Prometheus plugin (port 15692, `/metrics`, no auth — easy generic case) and the Management plugin (port 15672, `/api/`, basic auth — typically `guest:guest` only on localhost; remote access needs a dedicated monitoring user). A discovery layer must probe the Prometheus port first and fall back to the Management API. Classification is custom because of the multi-mode logic; the Prometheus path alone would be generic.
